prompt_text: RudderStack vs mParticle pricing and features
response:
# RudderStack vs mParticle: Pricing & Features Comparison

## Pricing Model

### RudderStack
- **Free tier**: Up to 100K monthly tracked events
- **Paid tiers**: Usage-based, starting ~$120/month
- **Cost structure**: Pay per event after free tier
- **Advantage**: More transparent, generally lower cost for high-volume users

### mParticle
- **No free tier** (though trial available)
- **Enterprise pricing**: Custom quotes only
- **Cost structure**: Typically per monthly active user (MAU) + data processing
- **Advantage**: Predictable costs if user base is stable; volume discounts available

**Winner for cost**: RudderStack for startups/mid-market; mParticle competitive at scale

---

## Core Features Comparison

| Feature | RudderStack | mParticle |
|---------|-------------|-----------|
| **Data Collection** | SDKs, server-side | SDKs, server-side, webhooks |
| **Destinations** | 200+ | 400+ |
| **Data Warehouse** | Native support | Requires connectors |
| **HIPAA/SOC2** | ✅ Both | ✅ Both |
| **Real-time CDP** | Yes | Yes (Premium tier) |
| **Audience Building** | Basic | Advanced |
| **Data Governance** | Good | Excellent |
| **Customer Data Platform** | Core feature | Primary offering |

---

## Key Differences

### RudderStack Strengths
✅ **Open-source option** available (self-hosted)  
✅ **Better for data warehousing** workflows  
✅ **Developer-friendly** API & documentation  
✅ **Lower cost at scale**  
✅ **Reverse ETL** capabilities  

### mParticle Strengths
✅ **More integrations** (400+ destinations)  
✅ **Better UX** for non-technical users  
✅ **Superior segmentation** & audience capabilities  
✅ **Stronger compliance/governance** tools  
✅ **Longer enterprise track record**  
✅ **Better mobile app support**  

---

## Best For

**Choose RudderStack if you:**
- Need cost efficiency
- Prioritize data warehouse integration
- Have technical teams
- Want open-source flexibility
- Need reverse ETL

**Choose mParticle if you:**
- Need advanced audience segmentation
- Want maximum integrations
- Prioritize enterprise support
- Need mobile-first CDP
- Have budget for premium features

---

## Quick Verdict
- **Budget-conscious**: RudderStack
- **Enterprise/scale**: mParticle
- **Best value mid-market**: RudderStack
- **Best all-around CDP**: mParticle (but pricier)

Would you like a deeper dive into specific use cases or technical comparisons?
